title: Rename devis - Restore Defaults returns to official device name
scenario: Device name reverts to official name after Restore Defaults in Device Settings on Poly Bluetooth device
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the Poly device (e.g., Voyager) to open Device Settings.
Tap on the device name field and rename it to a custom name (e.g., 'V').
Navigate back to Home screen and confirm the custom name is displayed.
Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → More Settings or Device Info.
Return to the Home screen and observe the device name.
expected: The device name is reset to its official name (e.g., 'Voyager' or the full product name).
